visual_summary: A digital display showing a single number with decimal places; use when you need to showcase a specific value.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics:

Name: Number Ticker Decimal Demo
Description: A digital display showing a single number with decimal places; use when you need to showcase a specific value.
Style: bright
Interactions: 
Tags: digital-display, value-indicator, data-visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { NumberTicker } from "@/registry/magicui/number-ticker"

export default function NumberTickerDemo() {
  return (
    <NumberTicker
      value={5.67}
      decimalPlaces={2}
      className="text-8xl font-medium tracking-tighter whitespace-pre-wrap text-black dark:text-white"
    />
  )
}
